data.title: Nidec Initiates Tender Offer for Makino Milling Machine
data.description:
The latest update is out from Nidec ( (JP:6594) ).

Nidec Corporation has announced the commencement of a tender offer to acquire Makino Milling Machine Co., Ltd., aiming to make it a wholly-owned subsidiary. This strategic move is expected to create synergies in products, technologies, and sales networks, enhancing corporate value and offering a substantial premium to Makino’s shareholders.

More about Nidec

Nidec Corporation operates in the manufacturing industry, focusing on producing electric motors and related components. The company is known for its precision motors used in hard disk drives, home appliances, and automotive applications, with a strong market presence globally.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $19.83B

data.title: Banco Santander Advances Share Buyback Program
data.description:
Banco Santander ( (ES:SAN) ) just unveiled an update.

Banco Santander has announced the progress of its share buyback program, which has seen the purchase of shares amounting to 653,131,625 Euros, representing 41.2% of the program’s maximum investment. This buyback initiative, which has led to the repurchase of approximately 13.2% of its outstanding shares since 2021, is aimed at enhancing shareholder value and optimizing capital structure.

More about Banco Santander

Banco Santander, S.A. is a leading financial institution in the banking industry, offering a wide range of financial services and products. It focuses on retail and commercial banking, providing services such as loans, credit, and investment solutions to a global market.

data.title: OUE REIT to Release Q1 2025 Business Updates
data.description:
OUE Commercial Real Estate Investment Trust ( (SG:TS0U) ) has issued an announcement.

OUE REIT Management Pte. Ltd. announced that the business updates for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025, will be released on April 24, 2025, after trading hours. This announcement is significant for stakeholders as it provides insights into the trust’s performance and potential market movements, although it comes with a reminder of the inherent investment risks associated with the trust’s units.

More about OUE Commercial Real Estate Investment Trust

OUE Commercial Real Estate Investment Trust is a real estate investment trust based in Singapore, focusing on commercial properties. The trust is managed by OUE REIT Management Pte. Ltd. and is listed on the Singapore Exchange Securities Trading Limited.

data.title: Budweiser Brewing Co. APAC Finalizes Voluntary Shares and RSUs Grant
data.description:
Budweiser Brewing Co. APAC Ltd. ( (HK:1876) ) just unveiled an update.

Budweiser Brewing Co. APAC Ltd. announced the final details of its grant of Voluntary Shares and Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) under the SBC Plan. The grants include 40,204 Voluntary Shares and 1,404,919 RSUs for directors of certain subsidiaries, and 3,713,671 Voluntary Shares and 7,831,264 RSUs for other employees. The company also stated the number of shares available for future grants under the Scheme Mandate Limit, indicating a strategic move to incentivize and retain talent within the organization.

More about Budweiser Brewing Co. APAC Ltd.

Budweiser Brewing Co. APAC Ltd. is a prominent player in the brewing industry, primarily engaged in the production and distribution of beer and related products. The company operates within the Asia-Pacific region, focusing on expanding its market presence and catering to a diverse consumer base.

data.title: Entra ASA Expands Leasing Portfolio with New Oslo Contract
data.description:
Entra ASA ( (GB:0R3Y) ) has issued an update.

Entra ASA has secured a new lease agreement for approximately 2,800 square meters at Verkstedveien 3 in Skøyen, Oslo. The lease, which has a minimum duration of three years starting in the third quarter of 2025, signifies Entra’s continued growth and commitment to expanding its footprint in key urban locations, potentially enhancing its market position and providing stable revenue streams.

More about Entra ASA

Entra ASA is a leading real estate company in Norway, focusing on the development, leasing, and management of office properties. The company primarily operates in urban areas, with a significant presence in Oslo, and aims to provide sustainable and high-quality office spaces to its clients.

data.title: Nexteq Releases 2024 Annual Report and Announces 2025 AGM
data.description:
The latest update is out from Quixant ( (GB:NXQ) ).

Nexteq PLC has announced the distribution of its annual report and accounts for the year ended December 31, 2024, alongside the notice for its 2025 Annual General Meeting (AGM), scheduled for April 29, 2025. This announcement underscores Nexteq’s commitment to transparency and shareholder engagement, potentially reinforcing its market position and stakeholder trust.

More about Quixant

Nexteq is a strategic technology solutions provider operating in selected industrial markets, offering innovative technology that enables global electronic equipment manufacturers to outsource non-core aspects of their product offerings. The company operates through two distinct brands, Quixant and Densitron, and serves over 500 customers across 47 countries. Nexteq’s expertise spans electronic hardware, software, display, and mechanical engineering, with a significant presence in Taiwan to support cost-effective manufacturing and strategic supply chain management.

data.title: China International Holdings Initiates Legal Action for Debt Recovery
data.description:
China International Holdings Limited ( (SG:BEH) ) has shared an update.

China International Holdings Limited has initiated legal proceedings through its subsidiary, CIHL Tianjin, against Beijing Kaiyuan Wanjia Management Consulting Co., Ltd. to recover outstanding debts dating back to 2013. The company is actively engaging legal counsel to manage the case and will keep shareholders informed of any significant developments, advising caution in dealing with its shares.

More about China International Holdings Limited

China International Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in Bermuda with limited liability. It operates through its subsidiaries, focusing on city development projects, particularly in the Tianjin region.

data.title: Prosper Construction Holdings Appoints New Executive Director
data.description:
An announcement from Prosper Construction Holdings Limited ( (HK:6816) ) is now available.

Prosper Construction Holdings Limited has announced the appointment of Mr. Li Chunxiao as an executive director effective April 3, 2025. Mr. Li brings extensive experience from his previous roles in various companies and departments, including Qingdao Haifa Assets Investment Holding Limited, where he served in multiple managerial positions. This appointment is expected to strengthen the company’s leadership team and potentially enhance its strategic development and operational management.

More about Prosper Construction Holdings Limited

Prosper Construction Holdings Limited is a company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, primarily engaged in construction services. It operates through its subsidiaries and focuses on providing comprehensive construction solutions.

data.title: ABB Executes Share Buyback Program, Enhancing Shareholder Value
data.description:
The latest update is out from ABB Ltd ( (CH:ABBN) ).

ABB Ltd has repurchased 606,540 shares between March 27 and April 2, 2025, as part of its ongoing share buyback program. This initiative is conducted under Swiss and EU financial regulations, with the total number of shares bought back since February 10, 2025, reaching 4,138,876. The buyback program aims to optimize capital structure and return value to shareholders, reflecting ABB’s strong financial position and commitment to shareholder returns.

More about ABB Ltd

ABB is a global technology leader in electrification and automation, focusing on sustainable and resource-efficient solutions. With over 140 years of history and approximately 110,000 employees worldwide, ABB’s expertise in engineering and digitalization helps industries enhance performance and sustainability. The company’s shares are listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange and Nasdaq Stockholm.
